title: The Bear & The Bees
content:
"Their honey I'll have when I please;
    Who cares for such small things as Bees?"
    Said the Bear; but the stings
    Of these very small things
    Left him not very much at his ease.

    The Weakest United May Be Strong To Avenge
meaning:
This evocative piece by Walter Crane, titled "The Bear & The Bees", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
